tldr.text: This book is most obviously relevant to practitioners who already have some experience of multiagency facilitation, but might also serve as an introduction to working in this arena, if carefully supplemented with further reading and exploration of the topics it covers.

journal.name: Journal of the Operational Research Society

title: Business dynamics: Systems thinking and modeling for a complex world

tldr.text: The modeling approach is discussed, a modeling approach representing the middle ground between the analog modeling based on differential equations in System Dynamics and the discrete rule-based modeling methods common in behavior-oriented modeling in the agent-based simulation community is discussed and claims are illustrated.

title: To deal with Complexity. Istanbul City of Muses. Architecture Infrastructure Archaeology: Spreading the Culture of Transformation
